output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?disciplineLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q3252557 p:P3349 ?eventStatement ; ps:P3349 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P2771 ?discipline .
  ?discipline rdfs:label ?disciplineLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?disciplineLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?disciplineLabel) , "ski"))
}
